chapter_title.en: Chapter 56 – The supplication for the illnesses and diseases

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: موثق - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (12/433)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: موثق - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (12/433)

parts.text: أَحْمَدَ بْنِ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ أَبِي نَصْرٍ

text: بِسْمِ اللَّهِ وَ بِاللَّهِ وَ مُحَمَّدٌ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) أَعُوذُ بِعِزَّةِ اللَّهِ وَ أَعُوذُ بِقُدْرَةِ اللَّهِ عَلَى مَا يَشَاءُ مِنْ شَرِّ مَا أَجِدُ

en.hubeali: From him, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad Bin Isa, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad Bin Abu nasr, from Aban Bin Usman, from Al Sumaly,
(It has been narrated) from Abu Ja’far<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘When a person has a complaint, so let him say,

‘In the Name of Allah<sup>azwj</sup>, and by Allah<sup>azwj</sup>, and Muhammad<sup>saww</sup> Rasool-Allah<sup>saww</sup>! I seek Refuge by the Might of Allah<sup>azwj</sup>, and I seek Refuge with the Power of Allah<sup>azwj</sup> upon whatever He<sup>azwj</sup> so Desires to from the evil of what I find’.
en.sarwar: 13. It is narrated from him (narrator of the Hadith above) from Ahmad ibn Muhammad ibn ‘Isa from Ahmad ibn Muhammad ibn abu Nasr from Aban ibn ‘Uthman from al-Thumali from abu Ja’far (a.s.) who has said the following: “Whenever one has complains of pain, he should say, ‘In the name of Allah, with (the help of) Allah, and through Muhammad the Messenger of Allah, I seek protection with the majesty of Allah and I seek protection with the power of Allah over everything that He wills, against what I feel.’”
